name: @caia/ea-research-conductor
description: EA Research Conductor sub-agent — initiates EA-led research when a recurring problem surfaces. Frames the question, dispatches a research subagent via @chiefaia/claude-spawner, tracks the research in flight, and feeds the result back into the EA Repository as a new reference architecture / principle / lesson. Checks the EA Repository for existing research on the proposed topic before dispatching (dedup). Maintains research-log entries at caia-ea/research-log/<topic-slug>.md. Per spec §4.4: the Conductor is advisory in the precedence ladder — it never blocks an approval.
